zoneinfo/available_timezones.name: available_timezones
zoneinfo/available_timezones.description: Get a set containing all the valid keys for IANA time zones available anywhere on the time zone path. This is recalculated on every call to the function. This function only includes canonical zone names and does not include “special” zones such as those under the posix/ and right/ directories, or the posixrules zone. Caution This function may open a large number of files, as the best way to determine if a file on the time zone path is a valid time zone is to read the “magic string” at the beg...
